message: Admissions for 2026/2027 are now open. Entrance assessments on 25 April & 9 May.
Open Day — Saturday 19 April 2026. Tour the campus and meet our faculty.
25th Anniversary Gala recap and photos are now available in the News section.
Second term fees deadline: 30 April 2026. Late payments attract a 5% surcharge.
New STEM Innovation Hub is now open to all students. Book a lab session today.
